text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur's been in something of a slump lately,
so we've come to a shrine.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
There's no logic behind asking for divine
blessings, so I've never put any stock in it.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
But Doto keeps hasslin' me about it, sayin' I
should at least try it.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
This should shut her up, at the very least. Freakin'
busybody.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
All right, then. If you think you can help me out,
go ahead and try.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
...It'd be ridiculous if it were this easy to fix
things. I'm the only one who can change myself.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Oh, Doto just messaged m—what the?!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
It seems the headphones I lost last month just
turned up...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although she doesn't believe in blessings, the
stream of lucky coincidences that follow help her
regain her momentum.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Oh perfect, rain. And right after I prayed too.
Chalk that down as a bad omen.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
As expected, the only person I can rely on is
myself. I should've just stayed home coding.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur ends up getting soaked in the rain and
fails to climb out of her slump.
